title: Unit 2 – Story & Welcome to Wales
description: Story, Legenden, Cardiff – Drachen, Magie, Stadt

vocab.ex: In legends, there are always good and evil characters.
I don't like my ears, so I cover them with my hair.
Since has two meanings: since I was little = seit ...; since it's too late = da ...
Don't breathe on me, yuk! What did you have for lunch?!
That firewood won't burn because it's wet.
Who's the most powerful person in the world?
There are always guards in front of Buckingham Palace.
It's a big problem that people in the world today still die of hunger.
It was wise of you to take an umbrella on your trip to London.
Oil and water don't mix well.
Too many new buildings and streets destroy the natural environment.
How does this audio guide work? Just press there and choose your language.
When we return from our five days on the coast, we only have one day in Cardiff?!
She has a secret social media profile only for her best friends.
Many people die in wars, usually on both sides.
Our dinner guests will be here in ten minutes and you're wearing dirty jeans? Show some respect!
I'm not going swimming in that water, it's icy!

vocab.de: herankommen an; in die Hände bekommen

vocab.ex: Lucy, your marks are terrible! Mum, I'll do better next time. Is that a promise?
Dad, don't ask me to do the garden work again, I'm too tired. I'm not asking, I'm ordering you.
Sorry, you know the school rules: No holes in your clothes.
She filled her glass with water.
I'm thirsty. Can I have a glass of water, please?
You look really tired, you should get more sleep.
If you tie a dog to something, it can't run away.
I have to do a new exercise at the gym with a rope.
You mustn't go into deep water if you can't swim.
National parks protect the environment.
The Black Forest in Germany is popular with tourists.
She's grateful for her friends' help.
Unicorns aren't real, are they?
I don't know if I could give a speech in front of a thousand people!
I think I'm going crazy: I don't understand the maths homework at all!
Are you absolutely certain that you want to go on an exchange?
In many illustrations, fire comes out of the dragon's mouth.
Can you book boat tours down at the waterfront in Cardiff?
My dream is to see my own photos in a big exhibition.
The old shopping arcades in Cardiff like Castle Arcade make the city a special place.
At a hotel: I see you've put me on the 3rd floor, but I'd prefer a room on the top floor, please.
January is the worst month to travel to European cities, the weather is bad. But there are fewer tourists. Yes, you've got a point.
On the one hand he'd like to be a better rugby player, but on the other hand he doesn't want to train very hard.
The symbol of the city of Stuttgart is a horse. What about your city?
October the third is a national holiday in Germany.
